SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.ParkDTO

Packages that use ParkDTO
Package
Description
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

  • Uses of ParkDTO in client.view

    Fields in client.view declared as ParkDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private ParkDTO
    ParkParamsController.park
    The manager's park, loaded on show; null until the load resolves.

  • Uses of ParkDTO in server.control

    Methods in server.control with parameters of type ParkDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private int
    ParkController.currentValue(ParkDTO park, ParamField field)
    Reads a park's current value for the given parameter field — the old_value recorded on a change request.

  • Uses of ParkDTO in server.dao

    Methods in server.dao that return ParkDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ParkDTO
    ParkDAO.getById(int id)
    Looks up a single park by its primary key.
    ParkDTO
    ParkDAO.getByManager(int userId)
    Looks up the park a given staff user manages (via park.manager_id).
    private ParkDTO
    ParkDAO.map(ResultSet rs)
    Maps the current ResultSet row to a ParkDTO.
    Methods in server.dao that return types with arguments of type ParkDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ParkDTO>
    ParkDAO.listAll()
    Lists every park, alphabetically by name — used to populate the booking park dropdown.
